title: grants — OpenTelemetry metrics
description: OpenTelemetry / Prometheus metrics this module emits. RED pattern for the overlay resolver (the hot path — every permission check hits this); funnel counters mirror analytics.json event names but at the ops / SLO level (i.e. not gated by user consent).

metrics.name: stackra.grants.denials_issued.total
metrics.description: Rare + high-signal. Alerts fire on a sudden spike (deny is an operational intervention; a spike suggests an incident).

metrics.name: stackra.grants.active
metrics.description: Point-in-time count of active (non-terminal) grants. Sampled every 60s. Feeds the grants.max_active entitlement enforcement.

metrics.name: stackra.grants.self_service_grant_attempts.total
metrics.description: Privilege-escalation attempts. Alerts fire above threshold (default 10/hour per tenant — a stampede signals misconfigured RBAC OR account compromise).

metrics.name: stackra.grants.cross_tenant_attempts.total
metrics.description: Tenant-isolation breach attempts. Alerts fire on ANY occurrence (should be zero — non-zero indicates a bug or an attack).

metrics.name: stackra.grants.overlay_resolve.duration_ms
metrics.description: GrantOverlayResolver::resolve() latency. P99 target < 5ms with L1 cache hit. cache_tier: l1_process | l2_redis | db. outcome: allow | deny | rbac_fallback.

metrics.name: stackra.grants.overlay_resolve.total
metrics.description: Every permission check that involves the grants overlay. cache_tier: l1_process (hit) | l2_redis (hit) | db (miss).

metrics.name: stackra.grants.cache_hit_ratio
metrics.description: Rolling 5m cache hit ratio. SLO target: >0.95 on L1, >0.98 combined L1+L2.

metrics.name: stackra.grants.warm_cache.duration_ms
metrics.description: grants.warm_grant_cache middleware duration. outcome: warm | skipped | overflow.

metrics.name: stackra.grants.warm_cache.overflow.total
metrics.description: Requests where the caller had more grants than the warm ceiling (default 500). Lazy L2 lookups take over for the excess.

metrics.name: stackra.grants.bulk_provisioning.total
metrics.description: Grants issued via bulk. outcome: created | failed. Sum(created) + sum(failed) = total rows uploaded.

metrics.name: stackra.grants.orphaned_grants_reconciled.total
metrics.description: ReconcileOrphanedGrantsJob observed rows. orphan_kind: resource | subject. Alerts fire on a sustained spike — indicates missing cascade-delete elsewhere in the platform.

metrics.name: stackra.grants.reason_length
metrics.description: Distribution of `reason` field lengths on new grants. Values clustering at the min (20 chars) suggests operators are entering placeholder text — a signal to tighten the min.
